results.rendered_html:
sam-prāp (-pra-√āp) P. -prāpnoti, to reach or attain fully to, arrive at, effect, accomplish,  ŚBr.  &c. &c.;
to get, obtain, acquire, partake of, incur, undergo,  Mn. ;  MBh.  &c.;
to obtain as a wife or in matrimony,  Kathās.  :
Caus. -prāpayati (aor. -prāpipan), to cause to get or obtain,  ŚBr.  :
Desid. See sam-prepsu below.
